meaning: n.(植物)蒴果,胶囊,瓶帽,太空舱
examples: You are asked to swallow a capsule containing vitamin B.
A Russian space capsule is currently orbiting the Earth.
Try and keep it in a time capsule.
"I wanted to create a new Japanese original, " explains Keiji Shimizu, the owner of Capsule Ryokan Kyoto.
The article 'Capsule Ryokan Kyoto, where modern meets traditional' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
